description.value: IR INTERNATIONAL operates as a corporate office specializing in industrial components. They provide high-quality steel wire reinforced hoses, including models like DN125 (5") with various flange types, designed for demanding applications with specific working and burst pressure ratings. Their offerings also include materials conforming to GRADE ST 52 standards.
